title: The Duel in the Mirror World
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #16 as Luffy and Katakuri push their duel to its emotional peak while Sanji moves the cake plan toward the escape route.
scene: Luffy and Katakuri turn their fight into a battle of respect, endurance, and future sight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The pelican EEL is coming...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't get close to him! His strength is also like a monster's!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you doing!? The monster is getting away!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hurry up and take pictures. We're going to show his face to everyone!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Excuse me, I'm sorry.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Heh heh.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Excuse me, excuse... PFFT PFFFT!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll expose you to the fan club!! To all the islands of Totto Land!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll expose you to everyone in this country!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How dare you get your dirty blood on me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You tried to threaten me! The popular me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So much for you being the perfect big brother!! You're so uncool!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm Embar- Rassed to even tell people that we're blood- related!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's unforgiv- able!! You should both prepare for what's to come this time!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...My apologies.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was foolish of me to not notice the needle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In a duel between pirates... there's no such thing as playing dirty.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Huff...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not being able to dodge it was my mistake....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Our spectators sure are noisy...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In any case, they won't be able to handle what's about to happen!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: GyaAA A!!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: GYagh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Xyaha A!!!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: conqueror's Haki...!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: that monkey can use it, too....!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: DRIF DRIF...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I no longer...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: whereze

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: think that you're below my level.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is that so!? Glad to hear it!! Thanks.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: But... I'm gonna win!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Huff

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fist versus Fist in a one on one!

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 36 dialogue beats. Luffy and Katakuri push each other beyond technique, turning the fight into a test of conviction.
